assets.prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: website devotional nature image
Primary request: A detailed close-up of a sacred Kadamba tree in Vrindavan at sunset, its golden-orange blossoms radiating a soft light.
Scene/backdrop: a soft-focus blur of a serene Vrindavan forest
Subject: sacred Kadamba tree with luminous blossoms
Style/medium: photorealistic natural devotional photography
Composition/framing: detailed close-up with the tree blossoms as the focal point
Lighting/mood: warm sunset glow, peaceful and sacred
Constraints: no text, no watermark

Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: website overlay image with transparent background

Style/medium: highly detailed photorealistic wildlife illustration
Composition/framing: full-body centered composition with clean edges for overlay placement
Lighting/mood: vibrant iridescent colors, elegant and lively

Use case: photorealistic-natural

Lighting/mood: warm, cheerful daylight

Use case: photorealistic-natural

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: website devotional scene image

Lighting/mood: golden, graceful, affectionate and lively

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: website playful devotional image

Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: website altar reference image

Subject: Ekadasi altar with fruits, nuts, tulsi leaves and framed Vishnu image

Composition/framing: centered altar composition with clean arrangement
Lighting/mood: soft candlelight, serene and pure
Constraints: no grains visible, no text, no watermark

Use case: illustration-story

Constraints: no text, no watermark

Use case: historical-scene

Subject: the Six Goswamis writing manuscripts on palm leaves

Composition/framing: group composition with each Goswami visible and absorbed in writing
Lighting/mood: peaceful, scholarly, sacred
Constraints: no text, no watermark

Use case: illustration-story

Composition/framing: energetic full-figure composition with raised arms and crowd motion around them
